title: hieracium granatense subsp. guadarramense
intro:
Hieracium granatense subsp. guadarramense is a rare and endangered subspecies of the Hieracium granatense plant, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae), commonly found in mountainous regions of Spain.

This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.

Research has shown that Hieracium granatense subsp. guadarramense possesses several health benefits, including antioxidant, antifungal, and antiparasitic properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues.

The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
